sentences.arabic: وَقَعَ هَاتِفُ لَيْلَى عَلَى الْأَرْضِ وَانْكَسَرَتِ الشَّاشَةُ.
sentences.translation: Lejlin telefon je pao na pod i ekran se razbio.
sentences.translationEn: Layla's phone fell on the ground and the screen cracked.

sentences.translation: Veoma se rastužila i rekla majci.
sentences.translationEn: She was very sad and told her mother.

sentences.translation: Majka je rekla: Sutra ćemo ga odnijeti na popravak.
sentences.translationEn: The mother said: We will go to have it fixed tomorrow.

sentences.arabic: تَعَلَّمَتْ لَيْلَى أَنْ تَحْمِلَ هَاتِفَهَا بِعِنَايَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Lejla je naučila da pažljivo nosi telefon.
sentences.translationEn: Layla learned to carry her phone carefully.
